Document:
# Core Rule 3 - Build a community Harassment of community members, admins, and other servers won't be tolerated. Attacks on people from other servers as well is not tolerated.
Remember to be patient with other players. People may be new or have differences making them unable to play the game the same you can.
Do not threaten to Ahelp people in LOOC (Local Out Of Character) or OOC (Out Of Character) channels.
If there appears to be a problem, use the admin chat system privately.
